title: App Settings - General - About - Up to date, release notes no wifi [New]
scenario: User views Release Notes in About section while offline and sees an error dialog that can be dismissed with OK.
steps: Ensure the device is offline (no WiFi / no internet).
Tap the 'OK' button to dismiss the dialog.
expected: The dialog "Information about this update isn't available at the moment." appears with an OK button to dismiss it. The app is up to date.
